titleStmt.title: SII 28.229: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 229. (A.R. No. 384 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, south wall.

This inscription records the raising of the śrī-vimānam (central shrine) in stone and construction of the eight subsidiary gōpurams (compound wall with eight turrets at regular intervals ?) for the god (Perumānaḍigaḷ) of the small temple (śiru-ttiru-kkōyil) at Uṟumūr a dēvadānam in Nalvayalūr-kkūṟṟam on the northern bank (of river Koḷḷiḍam ?) and endowment of three and a quarter vēli of land duly freed from taxes as the capital for maintaining the services in that temple (uṇṇāḻigaippuṟam), after duly supplicating the overlord (perumāṉ-aḍigaḷ) Chōḻa-Parāntaka, by Iruṅgōḷaṉ Guṇavaṉ-Aparājitaṉ. The three and quarter vēli of land was composed of three vēli in the village Kārai-vāḻkkaiyilāṉpāḍi and one quarter chey (vēli) in the village Charukkai, both in the same nāḍu as mentioned above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭakopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 8] Irupatteṭṭā
vatu vaṭakarai nalvayalūrk kūṟṟattut tevatānam Uṟumurc ciṟuttirukkoyil
perumānaṭikaḷukku śrīvimānaṅ kaṟṟaḷiyeṭuppittu Aṣṭaparivāra kopurañ
ceyvittu Uṭaiār coḻapperumaāṉaṭikaḷ śrīparān=takadevarkku Iruṅkoḷa
ṉ kuṇavaṉaparājitaṉ viṇṇappañceyya Aruḷuppāṭṭāṟ Uṇṇāḻikaippuṟañce
yta nilam Innāṭṭukkārai vāḻkkaiyilāṉ pāṭiyeṉnum perāl nilamuveli
Orāttiyarkku veli yennum corvum Iṉṟumin nāṭṭuc carukkaiyāṉkuṭik kāṟc ceyyumaāka muṉṟe kā
l Immuṉṟai kālumiṟaiyiḻitti Iṟaiyiliyāka Udakapūrvañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ ciṟuttirukkoyil bhaṭṭārarkku Iruṅkoḷaṉ ku
ṇavaṉaparājitanen Innila muṉṟekālum candrādityavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyākavum Innam Āḷpāṭiyāṉa nilattuk kellai kiḻ
pāṟkellai veḷiyakkuṭi Ellaikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai piṭavūr nāṭṭu veṇṭalaiyūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum kiḻak
ku nokkic ciṟṟalai veḷūrkke pāynta vāykkāliṉ vaṭakku melpāṟkellai pūtaṉkuṭi yellaikkukkuk kiḻak
kum vaṭapāṟkkellai veḷiyakkuṭikke kiḻakkup pāyanta vāykkāliṉIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 28.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
